mapper.select: SELECT v.`id`, v.`shop_id`, v.`title`, v.`sub_title`, v.`rules`, v.`pay_value`, v.`actual_value`, v.`type`, sv.`stock`, sv.`begin_time` AS beginTime, sv.`end_time` AS endTime FROM tb_voucher v LEFT JOIN tb_seckill_voucher sv ON v.id = sv.voucher_id WHERE v.shop_id = #{shopId} AND v.status = 1

SELECT v.`id`, v.`shop_id`, v.`title`, v.`sub_title`, v.`rules`, v.`pay_value`, v.`actual_value`, v.`type`, v.`status`, sv.`stock`, sv.`begin_time` AS beginTime, sv.`end_time` AS endTime FROM tb_voucher v INNER JOIN tb_seckill_voucher sv ON v.id = sv.voucher_id WHERE v.shop_id = #{shopId} AND v.status = 1 ORDER BY sv.`begin_time` DESC

SELECT v.`id`, v.`shop_id`, v.`title`, v.`sub_title`, v.`rules`, v.`pay_value`, v.`actual_value`, v.`type`, v.`status`, sv.`stock`, sv.`begin_time` AS beginTime, sv.`end_time` AS endTime FROM tb_voucher v LEFT JOIN tb_seckill_voucher sv ON v.id = sv.voucher_id WHERE v.id IN
#{voucherId}

SELECT v.`id`, v.`shop_id`, v.`title`, v.`sub_title`, v.`rules`, v.`pay_value`, v.`actual_value`, v.`type`, v.`status`, sv.`stock`, sv.`begin_time` AS beginTime, sv.`end_time` AS endTime FROM tb_voucher v LEFT JOIN tb_seckill_voucher sv ON v.id = sv.voucher_id WHERE v.status = 1 AND sv.begin_time <= NOW() AND sv.end_time >= NOW()

SELECT v.`id`, v.`shop_id`, v.`title`, v.`sub_title`, v.`rules`, v.`pay_value`, v.`actual_value`, v.`type`, v.`status`, sv.`stock`, sv.`begin_time` AS beginTime, sv.`end_time` AS endTime, v.`create_time` AS createTime, v.`update_time` AS updateTime FROM tb_voucher v LEFT JOIN tb_seckill_voucher sv ON v.id = sv.voucher_id ORDER BY v.`update_time` DESC, v.`id` DESC
